'''lasuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oenite|oenite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oenite|oenite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lasuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læsikith|læsikith]] || [[word:læsikij|læsikij]] || [[word:læsikish|læsikish]] || [[word:læsiki|læsiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lasusukuth|lasusukuth]] || [[word:lasusukuj|lasusukuj]] || [[word:lasusukush|lasusukush]] || [[word:lasusuku|lasusuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lasukuth|lasukuth]] || [[word:lasukuj|lasukuj]] || [[word:lasukush|lasukush]] || [[word:lasuku|lasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lasufkuth|lasufkuth]] || [[word:lasufkuj|lasufkuj]] || [[word:lasufkush|lasufkush]] || [[word:lasufkuf|lasufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lasukuthu|lasukuthu]] || [[word:lasukuju|lasukuju]] || [[word:lasukushu|lasukushu]] || [[word:lasukuku|lasukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lasukuth|lasukuth]] || [[word:lasukuj|lasukuj]] || [[word:lasukush|lasukush]] || [[word:lasuku|lasuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lasukuthul|lasukuthul]] || [[word:lasukujul|lasukujul]] || [[word:lasukushul|lasukushul]] || [[word:lasukukul|lasukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lasukuthuthu|lasukuthuthu]] || [[word:lasukujuju|lasukujuju]] || [[word:lasukushushu|lasukushushu]] || [[word:lasukuku|lasukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lasukuthun|lasukuthun]] || [[word:lasukujun|lasukujun]] || [[word:lasukushun|lasukushun]] || [[word:lasukukun|lasukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lasukuthuoro|lasukuthuoro]] || [[word:lasukujuoro|lasukujuoro]] || [[word:lasukushuoro|lasukushuoro]] || [[word:lasukukuoro|lasukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
